body:
This PR adds some small configuration improvements now that #1900 has been merged in.
# Content
- Change buildkite configuration filepath variables for slightly nicer formatting ($ CONFIG_PATH instead of ${CONFIG_PATH})
- Improve  configuration documentation example
- Rename two config arguments: `max_newton_iters` -> `max_newton_iters_ode` and `edmfx_adv_test` -> `isolated_columns` (addressing the remaning of @tapios' comments on #1900
- Update examples/README.md
- Fix some docstrings in `yaml_helper.jl`
title: Small configuration improvements after #1900
